conservative.name: Social Drinking
conservative.requirements: An ample supply of beer or spirits. GOOD beer and spirits

success.description: You offer around a refreshing beverage, instantly creating an atmosphere of conviviality for man and dwarf alike

boon.description: You and all dwarfs in the area recover 1 stress

bane.description: Overindulgence! Make an Average (2d) Resilience (To) check to gain the Intoxicated condition until you sleep it off

reckless.name: Social Drinking
reckless.requirements: An ample supply of beer or spirits. Your target must accept a drink, and you must drink with him

success.description: Plying your target with drink, you Influence him
As above, and you spread the goodwill and cheer liberally about. Everyone drinking with you gains to Charm checks until the beer runs out

boon.description: Your target must make an Average (2d) Resilience (To) check to gain the Intoxicated condition until you sleep it off

bane.description: Overindulgence! Make an Average (2d) Resilience (To) check to gain the Intoxicated condition until you sleep it off
